body_text: FOLLOW-UP NEEDED, customer is waiting on a team answer.
Customer wants details on the Deye 6KW off-grid inverter. No price or stock confirmed yet, needs a team reply.

_notes.purpose: Permanent-delivery version of the owner escalation alert. Lets Sunny reach an owner / sales desk even when that number has been silent for more than 24h (free-form sends are blocked outside the 24h customer-service window; approved templates are not). Mirrors the concise free-form alert built by src/owner_alert.js > buildOwnerAlertText.
_notes.category_reason: UTILITY: it is an operational notification tied to a live lead, not marketing.

variables.{{1}} (BODY): typed header line from ESCALATION_HEADERS (HOT LEAD / FOLLOW-UP NEEDED / NEGOTIATION / BIG PROJECT / etc.)
variables.{{3}} (BODY): product discussed; pass 'Not specified' when none (template variables cannot be blank)
variables.{{4}} (BODY): the 2-line situation summary (owner_brief), or the fallback one-liner
variables.{{1}} (BUTTON URL suffix): the customer's digits plus URL-encoded follow-up draft, e.g. '2348034455038?text=Hello...'. Appended to the fixed base https://wa.me/

open_questions_for_review: Meta sometimes rejects a BODY that starts with a variable; we prefix a fixed 'Electro-Sun lead alert.' line to avoid that. Verify on submission.
Body variables cannot contain newlines on some validations; the 2-line summary {{4}} uses a space-joined single line if Meta rejects the embedded newline. Confirm at submit time.
Decide whether to send the template ALWAYS, or only when the recipient's 24h window is closed (free-form keeps richer formatting inside the window).
Confirm the dynamic URL-button suffix is accepted; if not, fall back to putting the wa.me link as a plain text body variable (Meta is pickier about links in body text).
_notes.how_to_submit: Ensure META_WABA_ID is the live WABA (986225450549617) in .env, add 'templates/owner_escalation_alert_en.json' to TEMPLATE_FILES in scripts/submit_templates.js, then run: node scripts/submit_templates.js. Check status with: node scripts/check_templates.js. DO NOT submit until we decide (kept offline 2026-06-06).
